title: Iran threatens shipping in Gulf, Red Sea; Trump's blockade continues
snippet: Iran's IRGC announces Tehran would not allow import/export through Persian Gulf, Gulf of Oman AND Red Sea unless US lifts blockade. Commander Ali Abdollahi of Khatam al-Anbiya HQ warns of 'firm and decisive' military action. First formal Red Sea blockade threat from Iran.
tag_reason: 이란의 홍해 봉쇄 위협은 4/15 완전 신규. 이전에는 호르무즈/걸프만만 언급했으나 홍해까지 확대 위협은 처음. 에스컬레이션의 질적 변화.
